narrative:
Cols 75-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,361 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
